Get Started

The Leading Self-Custody Wallet. Secure Your Crypto with Confidence.

Uncompromising security. Complete control.

The All-in-One XRPL Experience

Self-Custodial
Your keys, your crypto. Take full control and access your funds securely with passcodes or biometrics (fingerprint, Face ID), giving you direct ownership—no middleman, no compromises.
Multiple Accounts
Easily create and manage multiple XRP Ledger accounts. Create new accounts or import existing ones, all in one secure, streamlined interface designed for maximum flexibility and security.
Tokens
Experience lightning-fast transactions on the XRP Ledger. Settle transactions in 3-5 seconds without missing a beat.
Vibrant Ecosystem
Access the entire XRPL and Xahau ecosystems with unmatched security —effortless, powerful, and trusted.
Get Started

Get Your Tangem Cards

Experience ultimate security with Tangem’s NFC hardware, integrated into the Xaman experience. With an embedded chip storing your private key, you maintain full self-custody and control. It’s the safest way to manage your funds on the go.
Get your Tangem cards

The Backbone of XRPL Development

For over five years, we’ve set the standard for security with zero breaches. We're more than a wallet, our libraries and infrastructure power the entire XRPL ecosystem.

Developers

We provide the tools, you build the future. Focus on innovation — we’ll handle the security and user experience.
We provide the tools, developers create the magic.
Our libraries connect developers with users, driving a thriving ecosystem.
Xaman is the go-to platform, essential for XRPL innovation and growth.
The XRPL ecosystem is only as strong as what developers build—and we’re here to support that growth.
DocumentationDeveloper Console

XRPL Users

Connecting you to the full power of the XRPL.
Xaman is where users engage with the entire XRPL ecosystem.
Sign in to nearly every project on the XRPL.
The trusted standard, relied upon by tons of users and developers.
Seamless passcode or biometric access keeps you in full control.
Protect Your Assets

Effortless Integration

Sign in to any XRPL website with Xaman on your phone or desktop.
Sign transactions directly in the app—safe and simple.
Connect seamlessly to every corner of the XRPL ecosystem.
Secure wallet integration for secure and trusted access.

Trusted by Hundreds of Products Across the Ecosystem

Rigorously Audited
Built by a team with security at its core, ensuring unmatched protection for your assets.

The Core Powering the XRPL Ecosystem

Developers build on us. Users trust us. For over five years, Xaman has been the backbone of XRPL—delivering unmatched stability and uncompromising security, without a single breach.

Trusted by Our Community

Alex
I've been using Xaman for years and have never had any issues. It's 100% reliable, fast, and easy to use. If you hold XRP, this is your go-to cold wallet. Plus, the customer support is excellent—they respond to any questions super fast. Top-tier app!
Chris
I've experienced multiple wallets, from Hashpack to VeChain, and got them early on. I was also an early user of Xaman Wallet, back when it was called XUMM. I can honestly say that Xaman Wallet is the best. Regardless of changes and updates, Wietse and his team are unmatched in delivering everything you could want from a wallet
Zifnahb
My number one choice for keeping coins safe. Great built-in DEX, excellent support, and running smoothly for years. Easy onboarding for XRP. Overall, an awesome app.
Sukansha
I take my hat off to XRPL Labs in the Netherlands. The Xaman Wallet they’ve built was excellent from the start and keeps getting better with features you actually want (they really listen to the community) and some you never even imagined. It provides data for everything, and the user interface is simple, convenient, reliable, and intuitive.
rMkvA
It's been the best possible introduction to crypto for me since I got involved in 2020. Xaman was my training ground for sending and receiving crypto, trusting transactions, and using xApps within the app. It helped me track my earnings, understand trustlines, and support various projects through interactions and airdrops. Thank you!
rNcWa....
Their customer support team is helpful, informative, good-humored, and polite. Xaman is a boon to the ecosystem and, by far, the best wallet I’ve ever tried.
Alex
I've been using Xaman for years and have never had any issues. It's 100% reliable, fast, and easy to use. If you hold XRP, this is your go-to cold wallet. Plus, the customer support is excellent—they respond to any questions super fast. Top-tier app!

I've experienced multiple wallets, from Hashpack to VeChain, and got them early on. I was also an early user of Xaman Wallet, back when it was called XUMM. I can honestly say that Xaman Wallet is the best. Regardless of changes and updates, Wietse and his team are unmatched in delivering everything you could want from a wallet.
Zifnahb
My number one choice for keeping coins safe. Great built-in DEX, excellent support, and running smoothly for years. Easy onboarding for XRP. Overall, an awesome app.
Stone
As a developer on the XRP Ledger, I find that the Xaman Wallet is the most efficient and easy way to connect to XRP Ledger projects. It’s also a convenient place to store your NFTs. Their customer service has been extremely helpful—very professional and always prompt!
Krippenreiter
The OG wallet I use daily—my one-stop shop for everything XRPL. No-nonsense, all features, and straight to the point. Xaman is definitely the go-to app that checks all the boxes and helps you navigate the Ledger with ease. Security? It's like having an InvariantChecker for peace of mind, with protection as tight as the ledger close_time. To me, Xaman isn’t just an app; it’s a Hook into XRPL technology and a TrustLine to the future of finance—intuitive and elegant. It’s my MasterKey to the DEX.
Kelly
Thank you, XRPL Labs! Your innovative technology has made using the XRPL simple and safe. After 5 years in crypto and having NFTs stolen from my MetaMask wallet, I’m incredibly grateful that I can trust the Xaman Wallet. Thank you for all your hard work—you're making the world a better place!
Ray
Xaman is my favorite self-custody wallet on the XRPL because of its seamless UI/UX and visionary team.
Shawn
Whenever I talk about the XRPL, it’s impossible not to mention Xaman Wallet. It has become the go-to wallet for interacting with the XRPL, offering all the native functions through Xaman xApps. I recently started developing on the XRPL using the Xaman SDK, and it’s been an amazing experience. The in-depth documentation and xApp builder make debugging easy, and support tickets are resolved swiftly. It’s a fantastic app backed by an incredible team.
Panos
Xaman has been an integral part of the XRPL ecosystem for the past five years, simplifying the user experience and becoming a one-stop shop for all things XRPL. It’s the standard wallet for XRPL users and a powerful platform for developers.

Self-Custody in Your Pocket

Experience the unmatched security of self-custody, now seamlessly integrated into a mobile wallet. With every line of code rigorously audited, Xaman ensures your assets are protected—offering you ultimate peace of mind, anytime, anywhere.

Latest Updates
From the Xaman Team

Read blog
Introducing Xaman 3.2: Faster, Smarter, and Now with Meme Coin Data!
We’re thrilled to announce the launch of Xaman 3.2, packed with exciting improvements and updates based on your feedback—including the introduction of our first-ever monetization model to ensure a sustainable future for Xaman.
XRPL Labs’ Commitment to XAH Lock-Up: Ensuring Predictable Supply and Market Integrity with a Treasury Hook
To maintain a predictable supply of XAH and reinforce our commitment to trust and sustainability in the Xahau ecosystem, XRPL Labs has built a Treasury Hook and is locking up 125 million XAH. By leveraging Xahau's advanced technology, we've implemented a custom solution: a Hook installed on a Treasury account combined with a dashboard for full transparency.
November 25, 2024
New Swapping Partner: Xaman Integrates Exolix for Effortless XRP Swaps
Xaman now features the Exolix xApp, which enables users to swap various cryptocurrencies into XRP and vice versa directly within the Xaman Wallet.
October 7, 2024

Frequently Asked Questions

What does self-custody mean?
Self-custody means you have full control over your assets. With Xaman, you hold your own private keys, ensuring your funds are always under your control—free from any third-party involvement.
How do I connect Xaman to other XRPL projects?
You can easily sign in to XRPL projects and interact with them using Xaman. Just scan a QR code and it will allow you to connect and interact securely.
How secure is Xaman?
Xaman prioritizes your security. With advanced encryption, passcode protection, and an audited codebase. Xaman is built with security at its core.
How is Xaman different from other crypto wallets?
Xaman is designed specifically for the XRP Ledger and the Xahau Network, providing self-custody, seamless integration with XRPL projects, and unique features like xApps.
Where are my funds stored?
Your funds are securely stored on the XRP Ledger, while your private keys are kept safely on your device, giving you direct ownership and control.
Does Xaman support Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies?
No, Xaman exclusively supports all of the tokens issued on the XRP Ledger and the Xahau Network.

Over 1 Million App Installs!🔥

The best support in crypto—just ask our community. 400,000+ satisfied users. We deliver kick-ass support, every time.
